sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113350" key="xaraki/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χᾰρᾰκ-ίτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῑ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n113350.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">living behind a fence</tr_>: metaph., <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cloisterling,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βιβλιακοὶ χ.</foreign> Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1473.tlg001:12:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.2</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n113350.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χ. τιθυμαλίς,</foreign> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">χαρακίας</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1473.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2956.tlg002:p.81" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Afric.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Cest.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.81</biblScope> </bibl> V., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg001:397" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.397</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
